label: 2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
race_name: Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres

extraction.one_line_summary: ASGREEN Kasper attacked on Oude Kwaremont with 39km to go alongside Van der Poel/Van Aert, then outsprinted Van der Poel after the Dutchman cracked with 50m remaining.
tactical_patterns: VAN DER POEL Mathieu attacked Van Aert pre-emptively at 39km out to eliminate him before final sprint showdown.
ALAPHILIPPE sacrificed own chances to launch teammate ASGREEN on Oude Kwaremont, tactical domestique role for world champion.
VAN AERT Wout neutralized by weaving attacks on Paterberg despite being in elite selection, suggesting climbing weakness under repeated accelerations.
ASGREEN held sprint power after 39km in lead group while VAN DER POEL blew up 50m from line.

rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: positive: carried E3 winning form into Flanders, had superior power-to-weight endurance after prolonged breakaway than Van der Poel
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: attacked too aggressively at 39km trying to drop Van Aert, paid for effort by cramping/exploding final 50 meters
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: worked tactically for ASGREEN despite world champion status, didn't have same legs as Oude Kwaremont selection
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: couldn't follow Paterberg accelerations despite making Oude Kwaremont split, vulnerable to repeated explosive efforts on steep gradients
rider_signals.VAN BAARLE Dylan: positive: led quality chase group for Ineos suggesting strong classics form beyond traditional leadership roles
